_doc: Auto-generated by generate_scenario.py — review fixtures + add expected_calls.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the folder that owns the job under investigation.
Agent fetches the job's execution details.
Agent reads error-level job logs for additional execution detail.
